headline: Is AES (AES) Offering Value After Recent 30-Day Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether AES is priced fairly or offering value right now, you are not alone, and the numbers provide useful context. The stock recently closed at US$14.10, with a 14.2% one-year return and a 13.4% decline over the last 30 days. This combination may signal shifting sentiment and changing risk perceptions. Recent news coverage has focused on AES as a major regulated utility and renewable energy participant, with attention on its role in power generation and grid...
